titleStmt.title: SII 20.183: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 183. (B.K. No. 47 of 1937-38.) NĀDA (KHURD), INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 2, Piṅgala, Āsh āḍha, śu. 3, Saturday corresponding to A.D. 1197, June 3. The weekday was, however, Friday.
The inscription records a grant of land for the benefit of the temple of god Chaṇḍēśvara by Kētagāvuṇḍa and Mudrehasta Mallaṇṇa, a subordinate officer of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Lakshmīdēva and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa praThis is engraved in continuation of No. 106 above.
tāpacakravarttijaitugidēvavarśada 2 neya piṁga
ḻa saṁvatsarada yāśāḍh�suddha 3 vaḍḍavāradalu śrīman
mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ maṁḍaḻikadāmōdara lakhmīdēvara
Ādhikāri mudrehasta mallaṇnanuṁ prabhugaḻuṁ mukhya
vāgi kētagāvuṁḍaṁ caṁḍēśvaradēvara khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhā
ra pūjepuna(ḥ)skāra caitrapaitra naivēdyakkaṁ sarbbanama(ḥ)sya
māḍi dhārāpūrbbakavāgi Ūriṁ teṁkalu siri
ḍagarada dāriyiṁ mūḍalu muṁnina keyiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa mattaru
māṇikēśvarada kōlu mattaru 3 mālagāṟaru biṭṭaru heḍagege
ḷa kāyi heḍagege voṁdu hiḍi bāḍu śivāya nama ©

yāṁ jāyatē krimi . ©
